source_text: Your country never had a lady from a poor tribal family becoming the President of India. You have that in javid .Prime Minister Modi has done that.

corrected_translation: आपके देश में कभी भी किसी गरीब आदिवासी परिवार की महिला India की President नहीं बनी। They में वह President Bhattadurai में नहीं है। Prime Minister Modi ने ऐसा किया है.
